title: Ghormeh Sabzi (Herb Stew)
description: The crown jewel of Persian cuisine. A slow-cooked stew made with fresh herbs, kidney beans, and dried limes.

title: Zereshk Polo (Barberry Rice)
description: Fragrant saffron rice topped with tart barberries, usually served with perfectly roasted chicken.

title: Tahdig (Crispy Rice)
description: The golden, crunchy layer at the bottom of the rice pot. The most coveted part of any Persian meal.
